retry_reason: The sock_put operation never fails; the iteration logic does not have a retryable failure mode.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to advance the BPF iterator to the next unix socket. The sock_put call releases the previous socket as a side effect of iteration, not as the main purpose. The function also increments the position and either returns the next socket from the batch or calls bpf_iter_unix_batch to fetch a new batch.
judge.retry_reason: The sock_put operation never fails; the iteration logic does not have a retryable failure mode.
